findings.evidence: `rg` hit: lines 167-168 are `rw [subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup_symm_mk]` followed by `congr 1`; `Deck/Fiber.lean:137-140` already provides `fiber_smul_coe` for this coercion.
findings.fix: Replace the `congr 1` step with an explicit subtype equality using `Deck.fiber_smul_coe` (or add a named lemma for `(φ⁻¹ • e : E) = φ.1.symm e.1`) and rewrite by that lemma.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup_symm_mk_coe` rewrites to the abstract representative and then closes the identification of `φ⁻¹ • e` with the explicit subtype by `congr 1`, relying on the reducible shape of the fibre action and inverse coercions.

summary: One proof still relies on undocumented definitional equality across the deck fibre action/subtype wrapper. Replace it with an explicit rewrite/helper using the existing fibre-action API.
